name: IBM Data Science Professional Certificate
description: Learn the most in-demand skills for Data Science and Machine Learning from IBM experts.

name: Microsoft Azure Fundamentals (AZ-900)
description: Foundational knowledge of cloud services and how those services are provided with Microsoft Azure.

name: Python for Everybody Specialization
description: Learn to Program and Analyze Data with Python. Develop programs to clean, analyze and visualize data.

name: Java Programming: Solving Problems with Software
description: Learn to code in Java and improve your programming and problem-solving skills.

name: IBM Full Stack Software Developer Certificate
description: Master the clouds, front-end, back-end, and everything in between for modern web apps.

name: Microsoft Cybersecurity Analyst Professional Certificate
description: Prepare for a career in cybersecurity. Learn to identify vulnerabilities and secure systems.

name: Meta Front-End Developer (JavaScript focus)
description: Launch your career as a front-end developer. Build a portfolio using React and JavaScript.

name: C# Programming for Unity Game Development
description: Learn the C# programming language and the Unity game engine to build your own 2D and 3D games.

name: AI Product Manager Specialization
description: Master the AI product development lifecycle and learn how to manage AI-driven products successfully.

name: Google Project Management Professional Certificate
description: Gain a deep understanding of project management practices and theories to prepare for entry-level roles.

name: Full Stack Web Development with React Specialization
description: Build complete web applications from front to back using React, Node.js, and MongoDB.

name: Applied Data Science with Python Specialization
description: Learn techniques like machine learning, information visualization, and text analysis using Python.

name: SQL for Data Science
description: Learn how to use SQL to query and analyze data, essential for any data role.

name: Selenium WebDriver with Java - Basics to Advanced
description: Learn automated web testing using Selenium WebDriver and the Java programming language.

name: End-to-End Test Automation with Cypress
description: Master Cypress for modern web application testing and build fast, reliable end-to-end tests.

name: Behavior Driven Development with Cucumber
description: Learn how to write BDD tests using Cucumber and Gherkin syntax to bridge the gap between business and tech.

name: Playwright: Web Automation Testing
description: Explore the power of Playwright for cross-browser, cross-platform web testing automation.
